seo.title: Uppu Karuvadu Lyrics Mudhalvan
seo.description: Full Uppu Karuvadu songs lyrics, Mudhalvan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Kavita Krishnamurthy, Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Mudhalvan, AR Rahman, Kavita Krishnamurthy, Shankar Mahadevan, Uppu Karuvadu full lyrics, Mudhalvan songs lyrics, Uppu Karuvadu lyrics snippets, Uppu Karuvadu WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Uppu Karuvadu lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Uppu Karuvadu, the characters celebrate the joy of food and togetherness, reflecting the cultural richness of Tamil Nadu. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and festivity, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song's context in the movie Mudhalvan emphasizes the importance of community and sharing. With its catchy melody and engaging performances, it leaves listeners feeling uplifted and connected.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uppu Karuvadu from Mudhalvan is a vibrant celebration of life and flavors, brought to life by the enchanting voices of Kavita Krishnamurthy and Shankar Mahadevan. With AR Rahman's masterful composition and Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics, this song captures the essence of joy and togetherness. Dive into this musical feast that perfectly blends tradition with modernity!
stanzaMeanings: Oh sweet language..
Salted fish is the food from the village.
Salted fish is the food from the village, just enough for me to eat.
When I gather pearls, I feel like I can set them in the crown.
Salted fish is the food from the village, just enough for me to eat.
When I gather pearls, I feel like I can set them in the crown.
Shall we catch a fish on the shore? Let's break the shell and eat small mangoes.
The small fish is swimming in the water, while the grass is growing around it, and I dance with joy.
Shall we take a sip of that drink and feel refreshed? Let's throw away our worries.
When it comes, it will be a lie, and the truth will be hidden in the moment.
Hey, shall I serve you on a banana leaf?
Look at the desire, oh oh, what is the pain in my heart? Let's do everything we can.
Salted fish is the food from the village, just enough for me to eat.
When I gather pearls, I feel like I can set them in the crown.
Oh sweet language, oh sweet language, oh oh, sweet language.
If only the bird sleeps in the nest, even if it steals the nest, it will protect its honor.
The lie of the dress is just a lie, but the real thing is the beauty that I hold.
In my heart, I hear it, oh oh, I remembered and acted accordingly, the truth is mixed up.
Salted fish is the food from the village, just enough for you.
When I gather pearls, I feel like I can set them in the crown.

When I gather pearls, I feel like I can set them in the crown.
